case_title: RICHARD HIRSCH VS. IT'S JUST LUNCH!

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY HIRSCH, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH! ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HIRSCH, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IT'S JUST LUNCH! THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT HAS NOT BREACHED THE SUBJECT AGREEMENT. THE AGREEMENT SHALL REMAIN IN EFFECT AND THE RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTIES SHALL NOT BE AFFECTED BY THIS JUDGMENT.
